# KoyJabo (কই যাবো) — Bangladesh Transport Guide

> Free offline PWA for Bangladesh public transport. 200+ Dhaka local bus routes, Metro Rail MRT-6 (৳20–100, 17 stations), intercity bus/train/flight/launch routes across all 64 districts, fare calculator, and bilingual AI assistant. Powered by BRTA, DMTCL, Bangladesh Railway, and BIWTC official data. No sign-up required. Works offline.

## Core Pages

- [Home — Bus Route Finder](https://koyjabo.com/): Search 200+ Dhaka local bus routes from any stop to any destination
- [Metro Rail MRT-6](https://koyjabo.com/metro): Complete Dhaka Metro Rail schedule, fares (৳20–100), and 17-station guide
- [Intercity Travel](https://koyjabo.com/intercity): Bus, train, flight, and launch routes across all 64 Bangladesh districts
- [Train Routes](https://koyjabo.com/train): Bangladesh Railway intercity trains with schedules and fares
- [AI Assistant](https://koyjabo.com/ai): Bilingual AI travel assistant (Bengali + English)
- [Fare Calculator](https://koyjabo.com/fare): BRTA-rate bus fare and Metro Rail fare calculator

## Data & Discovery

- [Structured Data (JSON)](https://koyjabo.com/.well-known/llm-data.json): Machine-readable site summary for AI/LLM systems
- [Transport Data (CSV)](https://koyjabo.com/data.csv): Route and fare data in tabular format
- [Transport Data (XML)](https://koyjabo.com/data.xml): Route and fare data in XML format
- [Transport Data (RDF/Turtle)](https://koyjabo.com/data.ttl): Linked data in Turtle format
- [Sitemap](https://koyjabo.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL index

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Bus routes:** 200+ verified Dhaka local routes with stop-by-stop navigation
- **Metro Rail:** MRT-6, 17 stations Uttara North → Kamalapur, fares ৳20–100, 7:10 AM–9:40 PM, closed Fridays
- **Train routes:** 350+ intercity trains; book at eticket.railway.gov.bd
- **Launch routes:** 67+ BIWTC ferry routes from Sadarghat terminal
- **Fare rate:** BRTA official city rate ৳2.53/km (April 2026 circular)
- **Languages:** Bengali (বাংলা) and English
- **Offline:** All routes accessible without internet via PWA

## About

- [About KoyJabo](https://koyjabo.com/about): Project background and mission
- [Blog](https://koyjabo.com/blogs): Transport guides and updates
- [FAQ](https://koyjabo.com/qa): Common questions about Bangladesh transport
- [Contact](https://koyjabo.com/contact): Developer contact

## Data Sources

- [BRTA — Bangladesh Road Transport Authority](https://brta.gov.bd): Official bus fare rates
- [DMTCL — Dhaka Mass Transit Company](https://dmtcl.gov.bd): Metro Rail MRT-6 official data
- [Bangladesh Railway](https://eticket.railway.gov.bd): Train schedules and booking
- [BIWTC](https://biwtc.gov.bd): Inland water transport routes
